case_title: JUDI MAR et al VS. JACK CHEW

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-12-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHEW, JACK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAR, JUDI TONG, RANDALL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHEW, JACK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,320.54 FILED BY MAR, JUDI TONG, RANDALL AS TO DEFENDANT CHEW, JACK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-20-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-21-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-21-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2009 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO AUG-21-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM: JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-21-2009 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
